problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: The key to What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? is Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating — specifically Atomic layer deposition — which would help 2,200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
